understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, avoiding spikes, and clearing breakable blocks.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT triggers automatic gravity fall until landing on solid tile, spike, or goal. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at target position and does not advance platform timer. UNDO reverses previous action. Passages are columns where landing y changes significantly; prioritize those. Spikes cause instant failure.
